sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '-infinity');
SELECT id, isinf(event_time) AS is_infinite FROM timestamps;
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, isinf(event_time) AS is_infinite FROM timestamps WHERE event_time <> TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01';
